studyName: Transcriptomic Profiling of Bulk Tissue and Laser-Capture Microdissected Neurons of Postmortem Human Brains in the Superior Temporal Gyrus

variables.name: AGE
variables.description: Donor age at time of brain collection

variables.name: BRAIN_WEIGHT
variables.description: Total weight of the donated brain (if known)

variables.name: DETAILS_ON_DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Instrument of autism diagnosis or known/suspected genetic cause

variables.name: DIAGNOSIS
variables.description: Case control status of the brain donor for autism

variables.name: PMI
variables.description: Post-mortem interval measured from time of death through time of brain storage

variables.name: PRIMARY_CAUSE_OF_DEATH
variables.description: Primary cause of death of the brain donor (if known)

variables.name: RIN
variables.description: Example RNA quality extracted from the brain (RNA Integrity Number)

variables.name: SECONDARY_CAUSE_OF_DEATH
variables.description: Secondary cause of death of the brain donor (if known)

variables.name: SEIZURE_DISORDER
variables.description: Indicates the presence of any known seizure disorder (if known)

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: ANALYTE_TYPE
variables.description: Analyte type

variables.name: BODY_SITE
variables.description: Body site where sample was collected

variables.name: HISTOLOGICAL_TYPE
variables.description: Cell or tissue type or subtype of sample

variables.name: IS_TUMOR
variables.description: Tumor status

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_TYPE
variables.description: Type of sample from which RNA-seq data are derived

variables.name: CONSENT
variables.description: Consent group as determined by DAC

variables.name: SEX
variables.description: Biological sex

variables.name: SUBJECT_ID
variables.description: Subject ID

variables.name: SAMPLE_ID
variables.description: Sample ID

variables.description: Subject ID
